li.label: manipulative
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is good at getting {PAWN_possessive} way. Be it love bombing or gaslighting, {PAWN_possessive} victims rarely notice what’s truly going on.

li.label: naive
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was taught everyone is good and kind. Maybe one day {PAWN_pronoun} will learn the lesson the hard way.

li.label: narcissist
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes in pretty privilege. {PAWN_pronoun} is desperate to achieve flawless beauty by any means.

li.label: health Nut
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}’s body is a temple, {PAWN_pronoun} only eats food to survive. {PAWN_pronoun} is here for a long time, not a good time.

li.label: emotional
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} feels {PAWN_possessive} emotions more profoundly and experiences greater mood swings. {PAWN_pronoun} often cries to release any frustration.

li.label: paranoid
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes good luck is an illusion and bad things are bound to happen. {PAWN_pronoun} is always ready for the worst case scenario.

li.label: goofball
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} acts funny in the day-to-day life. {PAWN_pronoun} silly nature often amuses others.

li.label: loyal
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is never gonna give you up.

li.label: party animal
li.description: For {PAWN_nameDef}, every season is party season!

li.label: insane
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} always seem out of place. No one knows what’s going on in {PAWN_possessive} head, not even {PAWN_objective}self.

li.label: proper
li.description: Follow the dress code, say the right word. {PAWN_nameDef} has immaculate manners that navigate them through every social occasion.

li.label: grumpy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} always seems annoyed, especially on a Monday. Others around {PAWN_objective} are constantly afraid to trigger {PAWN_possessive} grumbles.

li.label: shy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} struggles to socialise with other people, {PAWN_pronoun} especially cherish it while being on the receiving end of kindness.\n\nOver the time, {PAWN_nameDef} have learned to spend more time on organising and introspecting {PAWN_objective}self.

li.label: materialistic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes buying and bragging about {PAWN_possessive} new possessions.

li.label: vegan
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} avoids eating meat. {PAWN_pronoun} believes animals should not be treated as commodities and strives to rescue as many as {PAWN_pronoun} can.

li.label: devout
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} devotes {PAWN_possessive} body and soul to what {PAWN_pronoun} believes. Somehow, {PAWN_possessive} prayers get answered.

li.label: procrastinator
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to put things off until the last minute. {PAWN_pronoun} still manages to get those tasks done but the results are usually lacklustre.

li.label: non-committal
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} becomes tense after a while in the same job or relationship. {PAWN_possessive} fear of commitment facilitates change.

li.label: high maintenance
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} can feel a pea under twenty mattresses while sleeping. {PAWN_pronoun} is born blue blood with expensive taste and trivial problems.

li.label: family oriented
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} want big families and enjoy being surrounded by children. {PAWN_pronoun} will make an excellent parent!

li.label: steady hands
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a pair of steady hands that never shakes or even trembles under pressure.

li.label: daredevil
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} enjoys chaos and takes the extreme side in life. {PAWN_pronoun} can’t quit the adrenaline rush from being reckless.

li.label: chatterbox
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to talk and {PAWN_pronoun} sure talks a lot. People around {PAWN_objective} have started to develop immunity to whatever {PAWN_pronoun} says.

li.label: bookworm
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a deep love for reading. {PAWN_pronoun} reads fast and enjoys expanding {PAWN_possessive} knowledge this way.

li.label: handy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes to get on with {PAWN_possessive} hands and tinkers around. {PAWN_pronoun} has the natural aptitude of handling those tiny precision components.

li.label: virtuoso
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a natural gift with musical and instruments. It is as if the music {PAWN_pronoun} plays lingered in the air.

li.label: tech whiz
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is brilliant with computers and technology. {PAWN_pronoun} can hack into other people’s data and security systems with ease.

li.label: gambler
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} believes in {PAWN_possessive} own luck. Despite the crippling addiction, {PAWN_possessive} luck certainly tips in a different direction on the battlefield.

li.label: childish
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} never lost that childlike wonder. {PAWN_pronoun} sees things through the eyes of a child and need to be constantly entertained.

li.label: nosy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} ignores others' boundaries and likes pressing for more information, this often rubs people the wrong way.

li.label: huge power
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is noted for {PAWN_possessive} incredible strength. {PAWN_pronoun}'s naturally strong without the need to frequent the gym.

li.label: observant
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a pair of keen eyes that scans through every detail and miss no strange things.

li.label: zen
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} takes time to discover beauty in everything. {PAWN_pronoun} sees the world in a grain of sand.\n\nTo {PAWN_objective}, actively sabotaging life is a despicable act.

li.label: submissive
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} wants to be told what to do. Following rules and obeying authority are their second nature.

li.label: drunken master
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is supposedly a hand-to-hand combat specialist, but only when inebriated. They claim to become more talented the more drunk they are.

li.label: insomniac
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is never really asleep or awake. {PAWN_pronoun} is almost zombie like, lurching along and working very slowly.
